text:
Once upon a time in a faraway forest, a little squirrel named Sammy went on an adventure. His favorite thing to do when he wasned anything at all was collect shiny things. So when he came upon a shiny red berry, he couldn't resist collecting it.

When he got back home, he ate the berry. In the afternoon, he noticed a really shiny red one hanging from a bush. He gathered that one too. Soon, his small backpack started filling up with the odd things. It soon looked more like a little squirrel's peculiar little treasure chest.

As night fell, the stars began dancing around the oak tree outside Sammy's tree branch room. He'd peek out from his window to watch their parade, mesmerized.

One night, while gazing up into the sky, Sammy saw a shooting star streak across the starry constellations. He wished that he could have a shiny thing just like that falling into his nest.
